LanguageData.FCP_MoleratInfestation.label: 鼹鼠侵扰
LanguageData.FCP_MoleratInfestation.letterText:
鼹鼠正从地下挖隧道向您袭来！它们将在几秒钟内突破并建立洞穴。

洞穴将产生更多鼹鼠并扩散到整个区域。

如果您不希望鼹鼠感染整个区域，请摧毁洞穴。但要小心——啮齿动物会保卫自己的领地。
LanguageData.FCP_Incident_GrizzliesPass.label: 灰熊队通行证
LanguageData.FCP_GiveQuest_StorytellerJoiner.label: 一个讲故事的人
LanguageData.FCP_Incident_Mysterious_Stranger.label: 神秘的陌生人
LanguageData.FCP_Incident_Mysterious_Stranger.letterT: 你有一个守护天使，但有致命的手炮而不是翅膀。来认识一下神秘的陌生人，这是一个奇怪而可怕的实体，据说会在你垂死之前出现并在战斗中帮助你。或者至少这个人声称自己是神秘陌生人，但你将接受你现在可以获得的所有帮助。
LanguageData.FCP_CaravanArrivalTaxCollector_USA.label: US tax collector caravan arrival
LanguageData.FCP_CaravanArrivalTaxCollector_USA.lette:
A tax collector from the US is approaching.

They will accept tax in US dollars; you can also hand in prisoners. The one who gives over the tax will receive Service Points for doing their civic duty.

You can expect a tax collector to arrive roughly twice per year as long as you are not enemies with the US.

<color="#808080">
